login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Enter your credentials to access your account

register.title: Create your free account
register.subtitle: Start generating professional landing pages in minutes
register.passwordsMismatchDesc: Make sure both passwords are the same.

verification.title: Check your email!
verification.sentTo: We've sent a verification link to
verification.checkSpam: Click the link in the email to activate your account. If you can't find it, check your spam or junk folder.
verification.understood: Got it, go to sign in
verification.expiry: The link expires in 24 hours. If you didn't receive the email, you can request a new one from the sign-in page.

forgotPassword.title: Recover password
forgotPassword.subtitle: We'll send you a link to reset your password
forgotPassword.sentDesc: If an account exists with {{email}}, you'll receive a link to reset your password.

products.title: Products
products.empty: You don't have any products yet
products.generateFirstDesc: AI will create a professional sales page for this product.

landings.title: My Landings
landings.empty: You don't have any landings yet
landings.deleteDesc: This action cannot be undone. Saved versions of "{{name}}" will also be deleted.

generateLanding.title: Generate Landing
generateLanding.quickDesc: We'll use recommended settings: complete template, medium intensity, clean theme.
generateLanding.themeHint: You can change the theme later in preview
generateLanding.aiImagesDesc: Auto-generate banners for Hero and Offer
generateLanding.aiImagesLocked: Available on Starter plan or higher
generateLanding.limitDesc: Upgrade your plan to generate more landings.
generateLanding.stepImages: Step 2/2 — Generating images with AI (Hero + Benefits + Offer)...
generateLanding.imagesHint: Generating banners with AI for main sections...

generateBanner.title: Generate Banners
generateBanner.autoDesc: Quick and simple — AI decides the best approach for your product.
generateBanner.customDesc: More control — define the goal, tone and visual style of the banner.
generateBanner.autoHint: Even in automatic mode, AI analyzes your product and creates a sales-optimized banner sequence.
generateBanner.describeHint: Describe the benefits and features of your product (min. 120 characters)
generateBanner.describePlaceholder: Describe the benefits, main features and why your product is special...
generateBanner.sloganPlaceholder: E.g.: Transform your home!, Best quality at the best price...
generateBanner.sloganHint: If included, it will appear prominently on your banners.
generateBanner.autoDesignDesc: Our AI analyzes your product image to extract colors, style and composition. Generates agency-level banners with professional typography, harmonious colors and perfect composition.
generateBanner.howMany: How many banners do you want to generate?
generateBanner.sequenceDesc: An automatic sales sequence will be generated — each banner with a unique marketing angle.
generateBanner.analyzingProduct: Analyzing your product and creating your banner sequence...
generateBanner.limitTitle: You've reached your plan's banner limit
generateBanner.limitUsed: You've used {{used}} of {{limit}} banners this month.
generateBanner.limitUpgrade: Upgrade your plan to keep generating banners.
generateBanner.productNotFound: Product not found or access denied.
generateBanner.downloadErrorDesc: Could not download the banner. Try again.
generateBanner.generateError: Could not generate any banners. Try again.
generateBanner.partialFailed: {{count}} banner(s) failed. You can regenerate the sequence.

onboarding.welcomeDesc: With Nexsell you can create professional sales pages for your dropshipping products in minutes, using artificial intelligence.
onboarding.feature1: Upload your product and generate a landing instantly
onboarding.feature2: Persuasive copy created by AI to maximize sales
onboarding.addProductDesc: We'll generate your first sales landing with this info

upgrade.warning: You're close to your {{resource}} limit ({{used}}/{{limit}}). Upgrade your plan to keep creating.
upgrade.limitDesc: You've used {{used}} of {{limit}} {{resource}} available on your current plan. Upgrade to keep creating without interruptions.
